evidence: GameView implements node graph routes with multiple entrances, merge node, split nodes, rejoin node, and bastion exit
No laneY array or horizontal three-lane route template is used
Tower roster includes Archer Tower, Militia Barracks, Cannon Tower, Mage Tower, and Banner Shrine
Enemy roster includes raider, runner, shield, wolf, shaman, ogre, bat, ram, and warlord classes
Hero movement, reinforcement summon, meteor spell, barracks blockers, tower upgrades, wave preview, flying enemy, healer enemy, and siege pressure are implemented
Runtime art uses assigned Kenney CC0 tower and RPG packs with facing markers, movement bob, attack pulses, projectile rotation, hit feedback, and death effects
UI, gameplay art, icon, and audio workflows have project-local assignment evidence
known_limitations: Only Stage 1 is playable; Stage 2 to Stage 5 are campaign stubs as required for the first playable scope
